The '''''Kumauri Battleship''''' was an innovative [[Battleship/Legends|battleship]] design.

==Characteristics==
The [[Warship/Legends|warship]] was armed with a [[Mass-driver cannon/Legends|mass driver]] that used [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] as ordnance for [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|planetary bombardment]].<ref name="CRO" />

==History==
The ''Kumauri Battleship'' was developed around [[10,000 BBY]] by the [[Kumauri Empire]], on what was then the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The design was originally developed in the frontier systems of Kumauri space, and named after the empire's ruler, [[Vall Kumauri]]. The last line in the series of warships was the [[Cal-class battleship|''Cal''-class battleship]]. Although the Kumauri Empire was quickly defeated by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the ''Kumauri Battleship'' design retained its menace until the development of effective [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shields]], and the ship design was adopted by many other spacefleets, including the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] itself.<ref name="CRO" />
